inputs.label: Mother's Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the biological mother in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the biological mother in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße der leiblichen Mutter in Zentimetern.

inputs.label: Father's Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the biological father in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the biological father in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße des leiblichen Vaters in Zentimetern.

inputs.label: Child's Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for girl, 1 for boy. Used to apply gender-specific mid-parental height formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for girl, 1 for boy. Used to apply gender-specific mid-parental height formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kız için 0, erkek için 1. Cinsiyete özgü ortalama ebeveyn boyu formülünü uygulamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für Mädchen, 1 für Junge. Wird verwendet, um die geschlechtsspezifische Formel für die mittlere Elterngröße anzuwenden.

inputs.label: Current Height
inputs.businessContext: Current measured height of the child in centimeters. Used to adjust prediction toward the mid-parental height.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current measured height of the child in centimeters. Used to adjust prediction toward the mid-parental height.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çocuğun santimetre cinsinden mevcut ölçülen boyu. Tahmini ortalama ebeveyn boyuna doğru ayarlamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle gemessene Körpergröße des Kindes in Zentimetern. Wird verwendet, um die Vorhersage in Richtung der mittleren Elterngröße anzupassen.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
